judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent built a “latest releases” list from packageinfo using an IsRelease/Ordinal filter (call_9Wa7kVoSd23bRS2kGvHGNgRs) and then merged it with a broad project-to-repo mapping pulled via a LIKE-join (call_oK2FQ4IORnHSrHuj7Nf0oK0s), which omitted or mismatched dependency-derived package names (e.g., @dmrvos/infrajs>…>typescript, @dwarvesf/react-scripts>…>lodash.indexof) that appear in the ground truth, resulting in a different top-5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In execute_python (call_abCvp01RPwBmrBAbku2ldh1G), the agent extracted GitHub star counts using a regex that only matches numbers immediately followed by the word "stars" (r'([0-9][0-9,]*)\s+stars'), which missed entries phrased as "a stars count of X" (e.g., lodash/lodash), causing high-star projects to be excluded and resulting in an incorrect top 5.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly querying NPM release records and GitHub mappings, the agent’s execute_python step used brittle regexes (e.g., r"project\s+([^\s]+/[^\s]+).*?\b([0-9][0-9,]*)\s+stars\b") to parse Project_Information, which missed variants like “stars count of N” and “hosted under the name owner/repo,” causing no stars to be extracted, the join to yield no rows, and ultimately an empty answer to be returned.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
In the final execute_python step (call_JfgwvssICGZkXNf3kbORiPUX), the agent used an overly strict regex to extract star counts from the Project_Information text (only matching "has|with <number> stars"), which failed to match formats like "currently has 521 open issues, 38715 stars," resulting in all star values being dropped and an empty result set despite valid data being present.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no

FM3: no
FM4: yes

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent attempted a reasonable approach (latest versions, join to GitHub projects, parse stars) but repeatedly failed to execute the final parsing/aggregation step due to execute_python SyntaxError “unterminated string literal” (e.g., calls call_CBkHwOp45wP1Hfc3mzcQ6U6w, call_jSqrHm51rxZZH9AdGkfpn6PE, call_cwl0GyhI1oMVqvI9bZLiGnop, call_CYaBEPFL3stGloGrlTwcjMhp), and then returned an error message instead of the requested top 5 list.
